title: What Stem Cells Can and Can't Do
script_summary: Explore the fascinating world of stem cells and their limitations in medicine.

segments.voiceover: Stem cells can transform into any cell type — but they're not magic.
Pluripotent stem cells have endless potential, while adult stem cells are more limited.
Approved uses include blood and bone marrow regeneration. But many applications are still experimental.
The NIH emphasizes caution. Unproven clinics may promise miracles, but often deliver disappointment.
Understanding stem cells means recognizing their power, but also their limits. They’re tools for healing, not silver bullets.
Curious about stem cells? Hit like and follow for more science insights!
